primary_catalyst.description: Post-earnings selloff continuation (day 2). Stock closed at $178.79, down 3.3-4.2% on the day. Broke below 50-day and 100-day moving averages â€” technical trigger for further systematic selling. AI bubble narrative dominated; no stabilization attempt.

secondary_catalysts.description: Motley Fool: 'Nasdaq and S&P 500 Stumble on Fading Nvidia Optimism'

force_attributions.rationale: AI bubble concerns continued; capex sustainability doubts
Technical break of 50/100-day MAs triggered CTA/trend-following sell programs
China zero-revenue overhang continued to weigh
AMD competitive narrative from earnings call persisted

notes: Day 2 earnings continuation. Gap priority 'moderate' + volume z=+2.43 consistent with systematic selling after technical break. Closed at $178.79.
